title: codereview-pass1 IRQ handler in LR1110.cs: missing latch, buffer bounds, 32bit consistency
description: Logical chunk 1: IRQ handler (GetIrqStatus, ClearIrq, bufferOffset in Transmit/HandleOpcode). Findings: 1. No latchedIrqFlags like SX1262 (P1 race). 2. bufferOffset byte no clamp (P2 security/buffer-overread). 3. ClearIrq ignores 4-byte mask (P2). 4. DIO9 naming vs IRQ in SX (P3). 5. No lock in some paths (P2 from previous). File as codereview. P3/P4 mandatory fixes.
close_reason: All codereview findings implemented as real work (P3/P4 mandatory). No dead code. Conventional commit ready. Tests green.
